title: L'ultimo amante
writer: Augusto Camerini, Aldo De Benedetti, Luciano Mattoli
actors: Amedeo Nazzari, May Britt, Nino Besozzi
plot: Maria, a prostitute, meets Cesare in a police station, a drunkard reporter. Cesare falls in love with her and wants to save her from her bleak life but the girl refuses any help.
